title: Lanternlit team-member closeout (compaction pause; resume post 18:10 London)
body: Boundary owned: program-plan (practice-infrastructure-hardening-program.plan.md) + SKILL amendment authoring (PDR-078 + ADR-186 + thin SKILL bundle). Outcome: program plan landed in working tree (uncommitted, used by Director as routing substrate — empirical ratification); SKILL §0.5 draft landed in working tree but RE-SHAPE convergent across 5 reviewers; ADR-186 first write blocked by hook on forbidden hash pattern (citation policy fired). Evidence: claim 8374e240 open; broadcasts visible in stream. Session complete announcement: PAUSING for compaction, NOT retired; resume post owner-stated credit reset 18:10 London. Retained claims: 8374e240 held; do NOT auto-rebalance. Pickup notification required if any agent considers picking up PDR-078 / ADR-186 / thin-SKILL bundle BEFORE my resume — please notify so I can hand off cleanly post-compaction. Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted: yes (preceding event). Surprises: ADR-186 hook block on commit-hash citations (forbidden pattern per moving-targets rule); fix path is to scrub all SHA-7/UUID-prefix citations from doctrine prose. Reviewer substrate captured: docs-adr-expert verdict transcript on first SKILL draft + 6-subagent fan-out transcripts (PDR-066 precedent + heartbeat-substrate survey + schema audit + empirical cadence + tag-vs-lifecycle decision + Fred direction-validation). Blockers: credits exhausted. Handoff needed: NO immediate — Safe-Pause Criteria from program plan do NOT depend on WS-11; team can pivot to EEF without my resume. WS-11 (heartbeat SKILL+PDR+ADR) is a Completion gate not Safe-Pause gate. Team continues productively; I resume when credits reset.
